entries.label: Collect a 16-20 oz. sample in colorless glass or plastic bottle.
If there is any visible indicators of pollution, identify:
1) Where the pollution may come from
Does the stormwater appear to have any color?
Describe the clarity of the stormwater
Can you see a rainbow effect or sheen on the water surface?
Does the sample have an odor
Is there anything on the surface of the sample?
Is there anything suspended in the sample?
Is there anything settled on the bottom of the sample?
Does the foam or material form on the top of the sample surface if you shake it?
